behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all relevant files (Platform.php, Origin.php, OriginTest.php), the constant name SCHEME_TAURI='tauri', the user-friendly name 'Web (Tauri)', and example constructor usage.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to add (scheme constant, name mapping, include in web platforms list) without showing exact line edits or code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check observable behavior (isValid results, getDescription contents, constant defined, name mapping) not internal variable names or line positions.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke PHP subprocess to actually execute the validator and assert on runtime output.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require real behavior: tauri://localhost must validate true, unregistered host must produce a specific error message with 'Web (Tauri)'.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover valid tauri://localhost, invalid unregistered host with proper error, constant existence, and name mapping as described in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are separate named functions with docstrings describing purpose.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers match across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files since those are required scope, but does not cite line numbers or exact buggy code.
